name: Pawn Brokers
description_short: Pawn and Sell operates two reputable pawn shops in Queens, NY, buying and lending on jewelry, watches, coins, and electronics with 25+ years of community service.
description_long:
Pawn and Sell is a family-operated pawn broker with two locations in Queens, New York—one in Springfield Gardens and one in Queens Village. The company has been serving the local community for over 25 years, establishing itself as a neighborhood fixture for collateral-based lending and asset sales. The business model centers on providing fair value for personal items while maintaining transparent, customer-focused operations.

The company specializes in four primary asset categories: fine jewelry (gold, diamonds, platinum, silver in any condition), luxury watches (including brands like Rolex, Cartier, Tiffany, Omega, and Breitling), U.S. coins and collectibles (authentic gold and silver coins, sterling silver flatware and tea sets), and modern electronics (late-model iPhones, iPads, Apple watches, and Mac computers). Customers can either pawn items for short-term loans or sell outright. The business markets itself on friendly staff and fair treatment regardless of transaction type.

Pawn and Sell differentiates itself through longevity and repeat customer loyalty. The company reports 25+ years in business, 100,000+ total transactions, and a 72% repeat customer rate—metrics that suggest consistent fair dealing and customer satisfaction. The dual-location model also provides geographic convenience for the Queens market. Their emphasis on accepting items "in any condition, new or used, even damaged" suggests flexible acceptance standards.

As a pawn shop, the service is inherently limited to collateral-based transactions and asset purchases. The company does not appear to offer credit repair, debt counseling, or credit-building products. Pawn lending typically involves higher interest rates than traditional loans and carries the risk of losing pledged items. The website provides minimal detail on specific loan terms, rates, or redemption periods, which are critical factors for borrowers. No information is available regarding licensing, regulatory compliance, or dispute resolution procedures.
address: 222-16 S Conduit Ave, Springfield Gardens, NY 11413

pros: 25+ years of established business history in Queens community
72% repeat customer rate indicating high customer satisfaction and fair dealing
Dual locations in Springfield Gardens and Queens Village for geographic convenience
Accepts jewelry, watches, and collectibles in any condition, including damaged items
Accepts modern electronics including late-model iPhones, iPads, and Apple devices
100,000+ transactions completed, suggesting operational stability and experience
Friendly staff approach emphasized as part of customer service model
cons: Website provides no specific information on loan terms, interest rates, or APR
No details on redemption periods, late fees, or consequences of non-payment
Pawn loans typically carry higher costs than traditional personal loans or credit alternatives
Risk of permanent loss of collateral if loan is not repaid within specified timeframe
No information regarding business licensing, regulatory oversight, or complaint resolution processes
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash against jewelry, watches, or electronics they own
Collectors looking to sell or liquidate gold coins, silver, or valuable timepieces
Queens residents seeking local, in-person collateral-based lending without credit checks
People who want to temporarily raise funds without surrendering ownership (pawn vs. sell option)
diagnosis: Pawn and Sell is best for Queens residents who own valuable items (jewelry, watches, electronics, or collectibles) and need quick cash via collateral-based lending or asset sale. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive relative to other credit options and come with the risk of losing your items if the loan is not repaid—borrowers should only pawn items they can afford to lose and should explore lower-cost alternatives (personal loans, credit union PALs) first.
services: Jewelry buying and pawning (gold, diamonds, platinum, silver)
Luxury watch purchasing and loans (Rolex, Cartier, Tiffany, Omega, Breitling, etc.)
U.S. coins and precious metals buying
Collectibles purchasing (sterling silver flatware, tea sets)
Apple and Mac device buying and pawning (iPhones, iPads, Apple Watches, Mac computers)
Two physical locations for customer convenience
